sheets.name: Audit Checklist
sheets.description: Score each checkpoint from 1-5, set priorities, and add action notes.

audit_checklist.checkpoint: Brand guidelines document exists and is up to date
Unique value proposition is clearly defined and communicated
Brand voice and tone are consistent across all channels
Competitive positioning is documented and differentiated
Brand assets (logo, colors, fonts) are standardized and accessible
Website loads in under 3 seconds on mobile
All pages have clear calls-to-action
Website is mobile-responsive and tested across devices
Contact/lead capture forms are functional and optimized
SSL certificate is active and all pages are HTTPS
Content calendar exists and is followed consistently
Blog/content hub is active with regular publishing
Content is mapped to each stage of the buyer journey
Content performance is tracked and reported on monthly
Content repurposing strategy is in place
Active presence on relevant social platforms
Posting frequency meets platform best practices
Engagement rate is tracked and above industry benchmarks
Community management process is in place
Social profiles are complete, branded, and up to date
Paid campaigns have clear goals and KPIs defined
Ad spend is tracked against revenue/conversions
A/B testing is conducted regularly on ads
Retargeting campaigns are active and segmented
Landing pages are optimized for each campaign
Keyword research is conducted quarterly or more
On-page SEO (titles, meta, headers) is optimized
Technical SEO audit completed in the last 6 months
Backlink profile is monitored and actively built
Local SEO is optimized (Google Business Profile, citations)
Email list is segmented by behavior or demographics
Welcome/onboarding email sequence is in place
Email open and click rates are above industry averages
Unsubscribe rate is monitored and under 0.5%
Email templates are branded and mobile-optimized
Google Analytics (or equivalent) is properly configured
Conversion tracking is set up for all key actions
Monthly reporting dashboard exists and is reviewed
UTM tracking is used consistently across campaigns
Data privacy compliance (GDPR/CCPA) is maintained
Marketing team roles and responsibilities are clearly defined
Marketing workflow/approval process is documented
Regular marketing team meetings/standups occur
Marketing tech stack is documented and reviewed annually
Budget allocation and tracking process is in place
Customer feedback is collected and acted upon regularly
Customer journey is mapped from awareness to advocacy
NPS or satisfaction surveys are conducted periodically
Testimonials and case studies are collected and used
Customer support response times meet SLA targets
